case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC VS. JOSE B PANGANIBAN et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC SERVED NOV-06-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PANGANIBAN, JOSE B

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-20-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
